description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is padded and covered in a dark, leather-like material, providing comfort for extended use. The ear cups are rectangular with rounded edges, finished in a glossy black plastic, and are attached to the headband with sturdy metal hinges. The interior of the ear cups appears cushioned, likely for noise isolation and comfort. The headphones have visible seams and joints where the ear cups connect to the headband, suggesting adjustability for different head sizes. There are no visible wires, buttons, or branding, giving the headphones a minimalist and streamlined appearance.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with a padded headband and glossy black ear cups, designed for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups and the padded headband arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the width of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the continuous curve of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and headband profile.
